name: Sinch Communications API
description: Sinch is a global CPaaS provider for SMS, voice, and verification services. Use this API to send and receive SMS messages in batches, manage delivery reports, organize recipients into groups, verify phone numbers, and make voice calls at scale across 200+ countries.

capabilities.name: batches_send
capabilities.description: Send an SMS message or batch of messages to one or more recipients. Messages are queued and sent at the rate limit in FIFO order.

capabilities.name: batches_list
capabilities.description: List all sent SMS batches with optional filtering by date range, sender, and status.

capabilities.name: batches_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details of a specific sent batch by its batch ID.

capabilities.name: batches_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing batch message that has not yet been delivered, including modifying recipients and message body.

capabilities.name: batches_replace
capabilities.description: Replace all properties of an existing batch with new values.

capabilities.name: batches_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a scheduled or queued batch that has not yet been fully delivered.

capabilities.name: batches_dry_run
capabilities.description: Simulate sending a batch without actually delivering messages. Returns the number of recipients and message parts for cost estimation.

capabilities.name: delivery_reports_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a delivery report for a specific batch, showing per-recipient delivery status and error codes.

capabilities.name: delivery_reports_list
capabilities.description: List delivery reports for sent batches with optional filtering by status and date.

capabilities.name: delivery_reports_get_by_number
capabilities.description: Retrieve the delivery report for a specific recipient phone number within a batch.

capabilities.name: inbounds_list
capabilities.description: List inbound SMS messages received on your Sinch numbers with optional date range filtering.

capabilities.name: inbounds_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific inbound SMS message by its ID.

capabilities.name: groups_create
capabilities.description: Create a new group of phone numbers that can be used as a batch message target.

capabilities.name: groups_list
capabilities.description: List all phone number groups in your account.

capabilities.name: groups_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific phone number group by its group ID.

capabilities.name: groups_update
capabilities.description: Update the name and members of an existing phone number group. Add or remove phone numbers.

capabilities.name: groups_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a phone number group by its group ID.

capabilities.name: groups_members_list
capabilities.description: List all phone numbers belonging to a specific group.
